name: smartclass-attendance-miniapp
description: 智课考勤 - 课堂智能考勤系统

scripts.dev:mp-weixin: uni -p mp-weixin && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/dev/mp-weixin/app.json'; try { let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf-8'); c=c.replace(/,?\s*\"usingComponents\"\s*:\s*\{[^}]*\}/g,''); fs.writeFileSync(p,c); } catch(e) {}"
scripts.build:mp-weixin: uni build -p mp-weixin && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/build/mp-weixin/app.json'; let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf-8'); c=c.replace(/,?\s*\"usingComponents\"\s*:\s*\{[^}]*\}/g,''); fs.writeFileSync(p,c); console.log('Cleaned usingComponents from app.json')"
